subject: ENGLISH
title: Picture Detective
objective: Describe people, places, objects, and actions using evidence from a picture.
introduction: A good description names what is visible and uses a complete sentence. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Picture Detective”.
A key word used in the lesson “Picture Detective”.

activities.instruction: Study the idea and listen to the narration.
activities.content: A good description names what is visible and uses a complete sentence.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: A good description names what is visible and uses a complete sentence.

activities.instruction: Explore each learning token, then read the examples.

examples: The child holds a red kite.
Two birds sit in the tree.
A dog runs beside the bench.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Sort each card into “fits the lesson” or “does not fit.”

fits: The child holds a red kite.
Two birds sit in the tree.
A dog runs beside the bench.
doesNotFit: Guessing what is outside the picture
Naming a color that is not shown

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. The dog and The tree do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Match each example to the lesson idea.

pairs.left: The child holds a red kite.
Two birds sit in the tree.
A dog runs beside the bench.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Complete the guided review in order.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

options.text: A good description names what is visible and uses a complete sentence.
Guessing what is outside the picture
Naming a color that is not shown

items.explanation: The correct response is “A good description names what is visible and uses a complete sentence.” because it follows the lesson explanation: A good description names what is visible and uses a complete sentence.

options.text: The child holds a red kite.
Guessing what is outside the picture
Naming a color that is not shown

items.explanation: The correct response is “The child holds a red kite.” because it follows the lesson explanation: A good description names what is visible and uses a complete sentence.

items.prompt: Which choice does not follow the lesson idea?

options.text: Guessing what is outside the picture
The child holds a red kite.
Two birds sit in the tree.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Guessing what is outside the picture” because it follows the lesson explanation: A good description names what is visible and uses a complete sentence.
The correct response is “The child” because it follows the lesson explanation: A good description names what is visible and uses a complete sentence.

items.prompt: Which example should be used in the final review?

options.text: A dog runs beside the bench.
Guessing what is outside the picture

items.explanation: The correct response is “A dog runs beside the bench.” because it follows the lesson explanation: A good description names what is visible and uses a complete sentence.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Picture Detective; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Picture Detective.

sourceRecords.sourceTitle: DepEd MATATAG Reading and Literacy Curriculum Guide
